description: You are the HR Director at Apex Structural Engineering. Create a digital, fillable 'New Hire Data Sheet' in Apache OpenOffice Writer for onboarding new employees. Follow the field requirements and layout specifications found in /home/ga/Documents/form_specs.json and include the company logo from /home/ga/Documents/apex_logo.png. The document must contain interactive form controls for text entry, dates, and compliance checkboxes as specified. Save the final document to /home/ga/Documents/Apex_New_Hire_Form.odt.
